tuning: E A D G B E

strumming.part: Intro part 1 of pattern, Chorus part 2 of pattern

I Just Died In Your Arms

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch] 
  Shake it up, is all that we know [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch] 
    Using bodies up as we go [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch] 
  I'm waking up to fantasy [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm7[/ch] 
The shades all around aren't the colours we used to see [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] 
  Broken ice still melts in the sun [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] 
And ties that are broken can often be one again [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch] 
  We're soul alone and soul really matters to me [/tab]
 
Take a look around

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch] 
Livin' in the middle, between the two extremes [/tab]
